hooks.prompt: Check if the edited file involves file upload, storage, or image processing code. If so, verify: 1) File type validation exists (check both MIME type and magic bytes, not just extension), 2) File size limits are enforced, 3) Storage keys use random/UUID names (not user-provided filenames), 4) Presigned URLs have short expiry times, 5) Error handling exists for upload failures. Respond with {"ok": true} if all applicable checks pass, or {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} listing what's missing. If the file is not related to file/storage code, respond {"ok": true}.
